message:
fix: bool operations, collection comparisons, variable shadowing

- Bool arithmetic: convert bool to int for +, -, *, /, %, ** operations
- Bool unary: fix ~False/~True bitwise NOT using @intFromBool
- Identity comparison: use pointer comparison for arrays/lists/dicts/sets
- In operator: use &__arr to coerce array to slice for indexOfScalar
- Variable shadowing: shadow vars when reassigning list→dict or vice versa
- Type tracking: register shadowed variable types for proper inference
- Test skip: recognize docstrings with "skip:" to mark tests for skipping
